Off Calendar Sep-03-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Sancimino for Matthew Fishgold.

Ms. Sancimino explained the services provided to support the fee request. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
